title: gazania maritima
intro: Gazania maritima, also known as the coast daisy or noozem, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gazania maritima include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
